recovery_page_message_p2_native.description: Message on the recovery screen shown when no public gateway is set (recovery_page_message_p2_native)

recovery_page_button_installDesktop.description: Button on the recovery screen shown when no public gateway is set (recovery_page_button_installDesktop)

request_permissions_page_message_p1.description: Message Para-1 on the recovery screen (recovery_page_message_p1)

request_permissions_page_message_p2.description: Message Para-2 on the recovery screen (recovery_page_message_p2)

request_permissions_page_learn_more.description: Learn more link on the recovery screen (recovery_page_learn_more)

invalid_address_page_title.description: Title of the invalid address page (invalid_address_page_title)

invalid_address_page_sub_header.description: Sub-header on the invalid address page (invalid_address_page_sub_header)

invalid_address_page_opened_label.description: Label above the address the user requested (invalid_address_page_opened_label)

invalid_address_page_button.description: Button that opens the corrected address, $1 is the corrected address (invalid_address_page_button)

invalid_address_page_learn_more.description: Learn more link on the invalid address page (invalid_address_page_learn_more)

invalid_address_page_wrong_namespace_hea.description: Header shown when ipfs:// was used for a mutable pointer (invalid_address_page_wrong_namespace_header)

invalid_address_page_dnslink_message.description: Explanation for a DNSLink domain used with ipfs:// (invalid_address_page_dnslink_message)

invalid_address_page_ipns_key_message.description: Explanation for an IPNS key used with ipfs:// (invalid_address_page_ipns_key_message)

invalid_address_page_namespace_advice.description: Shared advice about what ipfs:// is for (invalid_address_page_namespace_advice)

invalid_address_page_lowercased_header.description: Header shown when the browser lowercased a CIDv0 (invalid_address_page_lowercased_header)

invalid_address_page_lowercased_advice.description: What to do about a lowercased CIDv0 (invalid_address_page_lowercased_advice)

invalid_address_page_convert_cid.description: Link to the CID inspector, shown when a CIDv0 was damaged by lowercasing (invalid_address_page_convert_cid)

invalid_address_page_learn_dnslink.description: Link to the DNSLink concept docs, shown when a website name was used with ipfs:// (invalid_address_page_learn_dnslink)

invalid_address_page_learn_mutability.description: Link to the IPNS mutability docs, shown when an IPNS name was used with ipfs:// (invalid_address_page_learn_mutability)

invalid_address_page_unrecognized_header.description: Header shown when the identifier matches no known form (invalid_address_page_unrecognized_header)

invalid_address_page_unrecognized_messag.description: Explanation shown when the identifier matches no known form (invalid_address_page_unrecognized_message)

invalid_address_page_unrecognized_advice.description: What to do about an unrecognized identifier (invalid_address_page_unrecognized_advice)

invalid_address_page_learn_ipns_record.description: Link to the IPNS record spec (invalid_address_page_learn_ipns_record)
